meaning: adj.(意大利西南部)卡拉布里亚的 卡拉布里亚人的 卡拉布里亚方言的
examples: This last scene shows you what will happen at the end of the harvest: the famous Calabrian macaroni-eating competition!
This highly oblique view also highlights two distinct cloud patterns over the Calabrian interior.
The Calabrian Peninsula appears shortened and distorted due to the extreme sideways viewing Angle from the ISS.
One of the Dublin registered firms has been heavily involved in promoting Calabrian holiday homes to British and Irish buyers.
The Calabrian town of Rende secured an exclusive loan of paintings from Malta for an exhibition at its Museo Civico.
